title: Interior Designer
description:
We are seeking a highly motivated Junior Interior Designer to join our team in Singapore. In this role, you will work closely with the SOG Design lead on design & build projects across Singapore and Asia Pacific and support the growth of our interior design capabilities. You will be responsible for the production of design work for architectural projects, and help prepare presentations, 3D modeling, graphics, and visualization documents to convey design ideas and project concepts to clients.

Key Responsibilities:·      
Build and maintain strong relationships with the team, project management, and advisory.
Deliver high-quality work in line with given instructions and respond positively to feedback.
Demonstrate a good understanding of the client/practice relationship.
Self-motivated and efficient in a multi-tasking environment.      
Manage creative and technical design delivery and coordinate project documentation.
Coordinate activities of teams engaged in preparing construction and furniture drawings and specifications.
Review and develop specifications. 
Assist and support the design team in areas of staffing and mentoring.
Establish strategy, goals, and objectives for design projects.
Assemble presentations and "leave-behinds" when pursuing new projects.    
Learn and utilize design and planning tools.
Deliver high-quality design work, developing creative and innovative thinking.
Coordinate aspects of third-party work, including external contractors, suppliers, and other professionals.

Job Requirements:
Degree in a related design field or equivalent certification.
Fluent in spoken and written English.
 Proficient in Autodesk Revit, Adobe InDesign, Illustrator, Photoshop, Sketch-up, and/or other 3D software such as Rhinoceros.
Well-versed in developing architectural visualizations.
Exposure to the delivery of large-scale projects.
Strong communication and teamwork skills, with the ability to work autonomously as required.
A talented designer with a portfolio of projects that demonstrate creativity and innovative thinking.
Expert in all conventional aspects of technical design/architectural principles.
Strong all-around interior design skills, including concept design, space planning, client presentations, documentation, detailing, and coordination.
Desire to constantly improve and seek opportunities for professional growth.
Exceptional creative skills, design visioning, and innovation.
Passionate about design technology, including immersive tech and visualization.

If you are an ambitious and passionate Junior Interior Designer with a strong desire to grow professionally and deliver high-quality design work, we encourage you to apply for this exciting opportunity.

Based on your experiences and qualifications, you may be considered for a Designer position.

postedCompany.description:
We are a globally renowned design company with offices in Barcelona, China, Vietnam and India. Our areas of expertise span across Masterplan, Architecture, and Interior Design, and we have successfully executed numerous international projects. Through our extensive experience, we have gained significant expertise in Commercial, Hospitality, and Mixed Use projects.

Our company operates with unwavering enthusiasm by combining a team of creative individuals, technical experts, and international professionals, constantly generating fresh ideas. We leverage the latest technologies to ensure our design solutions are effective and innovative. Our commitment to delivering exceptional results is reflected in our approach, which integrates talent, knowledge, and a global perspective.
postedCompany.name: SOG DESIGN PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
